Class AuditEvent

java.lang.Object
io.signoz.springboot.audit.AuditEvent
public class AuditEvent extends Object
Immutable model representing a single audit trail entry.

Published as a Spring ApplicationEvent by AuditLogAspect and consumed by SigNozAuditHandler (and any other listeners the application registers).
